add-png-logo-to-first-page.title: Add PNG Logo to First Page of PDF
add-png-logo-to-first-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, place a PNG logo at specific coordinates on the first page, and save the modified document.

add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image to PDF Pages with Opacity
add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a background image on every page of a PDF and set its opacity to 30 % using Aspose.Pdf.

add-transparent-png-overlay-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Transparent PNG Overlay to PDF Pages
add-transparent-png-overlay-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a transparent PNG image over every page of a PDF as a foreground stamp using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add an image stamp as a watermark on each page, rotate it 45 degrees for diagonal placement, and save the result.

add-company-logo-to-first-page.title: Add Company Logo to First Page of PDF
add-company-logo-to-first-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create an ImageStamp for a logo, center it on the first page, and save the modified document.

add-header-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Image to Each PDF Page
add-header-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, calculate a top‑margin rectangle for each page, insert a decorative header image without overlapping existing content, and save the modified document.

add-scalable-footer-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Scalable Footer Image to PDF Pages
add-scalable-footer-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert a decorative footer image on every page of a PDF and scale it proportionally to the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
add-background-pattern-image-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent pattern image as a background on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-pattern-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Pattern Image to PDF Pages
add-background-pattern-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent background pattern image on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-multiply-blend-mode.title: Add Background Image with Multiply Blend Mode to PDF
add-background-image-multiply-blend-mode.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, attach a background image artifact to a page, optionally set its blend mode to Multiply for subtle shading, and save the modified document.

add-background-texture-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Texture Image to PDF Pages
add-background-texture-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a subtle texture image as a background on every page of an existing PDF and simulate an overlay effect by adjusting opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-overlay-image-to-pd.title: Add Semi-Transparent Overlay Image to PDF
add-semi-transparent-overlay-image-to-pd.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent PNG overlay on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ImageStamp and control its opacity and alignment.

add-semi-transparent-overlay-to-pdf-page.title: Add Semi-Transparent Color Overlay to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-overlay-to-pdf-page.description: The example reads a theme configuration (hex color and opacity) from a JSON file and applies a semi‑transparent colored overlay to every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-image-watermark-to-.title: Add Semi-Transparent Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-image-watermark-to-.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating an ImageStamp, setting its opacity for a semi‑transparent watermark, applying it to each page, and saving the result.

replace-jpeg-with-png-on-pdf-page.title: Replace JPEG with PNG on PDF Page Using Resources.Images
replace-jpeg-with-png-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace an existing image on a specific PDF page with a higher‑resolution PNG by using the page's Resources.Images collection.

replace-jpeg-with-png-in-pdf.title: Replace JPEG Images with PNG in PDF
replace-jpeg-with-png-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and image resources, and replace each JPEG image with a PNG while keeping the original positions.

replace-raster-images-with-vector-placeh.title: Replace Raster Images with Vector Placeholders in PDF
replace-raster-images-with-vector-placeh.description: Loads a PDF, removes raster images from each page, inserts a vector graphic placeholder (a light‑gray rectangle), optimizes resources, and saves the resulting vectorized PDF.

replace-images-odd-pages-placeholder.title: Replace Images on Odd PDF Pages with Placeholder
replace-images-odd-pages-placeholder.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF, locate image placements on odd‑numbered pages, and replace each image with a placeholder graphic while keeping the original dimensions.

replace-images-odd-pages-qr-placeholder.title: Replace Images on Odd PDF Pages with QR‑Code Placeholder
replace-images-odd-pages-qr-placeholder.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, identify odd‑numbered pages, and replace each image with a pre‑generated QR‑code placeholder while adding alternative text for accessibility.

convert-even-pages-to-grayscale.title: Convert Even Pages to Grayscale in PDF
convert-even-pages-to-grayscale.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, apply a grayscale conversion only to even-numbered pages, and save the modified document.

replace-images-last-page-with-banner.title: Replace Images on Last PDF Page with Full-Width Banner
replace-images-last-page-with-banner.description: Shows how to hide all existing images on the last page of a PDF and insert a single banner image that spans the entire page width using Aspose.Pdf.

compress-large-images-in-pdf.title: Compress Large Images in PDF to Reduce File Size
compress-large-images-in-pdf.description: Shows how to replace images larger than 1 MB with compressed JPEG versions using Aspose.Pdf optimization options.

replace-pdf-images-with-placeholder-and-.title: Replace PDF Images with Placeholder and Hyperlink
replace-pdf-images-with-placeholder-and-.description: The example loads a PDF, replaces each embedded image with a low‑resolution placeholder, and adds a clickable hyperlink annotation that points to the original image location.

replace-pdf-images-with-grayscale.title: Replace PDF Images with Grayscale Versions
replace-pdf-images-with-grayscale.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page and image, convert each image to a grayscale bitmap, replace the original image with the grayscale JPEG, and save the modified document.

correct-pdf-image-orientation.title: Correct PDF Image Orientation Using EXIF Data
correct-pdf-image-orientation.description: Loads a PDF, reads EXIF orientation from each embedded image, rotates the image when needed, and replaces it in the PDF to ensure proper display.

compress-large-images-in-pdf__v2.title: Compress Large Images in PDF to Reduce File Size
compress-large-images-in-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, configuring image compression options to downsize images, optimizing the document, and saving the reduced‑size PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-images-on-pdf-page.title: Replace Images on a Specific PDF Page
replace-images-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace selected images on a given PDF page by mapping image indices to new image files using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-pdf-images-with-icc-embedded.title: Replace PDF Images with ICC‑Embedded Versions
replace-pdf-images-with-icc-embedded.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and replace every image with a JPEG that already contains an embedded ICC profile using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-images-with-logo.title: Replace Images on PDF Pages with a Logo
replace-images-with-logo.description: Shows how to use ImagePlacementAbsorber to locate all image placements on each PDF page and replace them with a specified logo image.

replace-title-page-images-with-banner.title: Replace Title Page Images with High‑Resolution Banner
replace-title-page-images-with-banner.description: Shows how to replace every image on the first (title) page of a PDF with a high‑resolution banner using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-index-page-images-with-banner.title: Replace Index Page Images with a Banner
replace-index-page-images-with-banner.description: Shows how to replace an existing image or add a new banner image on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-pdf-images-with-placeholder.title: Replace All PDF Images with Placeholder
replace-pdf-images-with-placeholder.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through each page of a PDF and replace every embedded image with a low‑resolution placeholder using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-all-images-from-pdf.title: Remove All Images from PDF
remove-all-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete every image on each page of a PDF by clearing the Images collection with Aspose.Pdf and then saving the modified document.

remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.title: Remove Low-Resolution Images from PDF
remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete images in a PDF whose DPI is lower than 72 using ImagePlacementAbsorber and related APIs.

remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf__v.title: Remove Images Below 72 DPI from PDF
remove-low-resolution-images-from-pdf__v.description: Loads a PDF, uses ImagePlacementAbsorber to locate all image placements, hides any image whose X or Y resolution is lower than 72 DPI, optimizes resources, and saves the modified document.

remove-duplicate-images-from-pdf.title: Remove Duplicate Images from PDF
remove-duplicate-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, merge identical image resources across all pages using OptimizeResources, and save the document without duplicate images.

collect-image-resolution-metadata.title: Collect Image Resolution Metadata from PDF Pages
collect-image-resolution-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, extracts image placements with ImagePlacementAbsorber, and reports each image's DPI and visible size.

resize-images-half-size.title: Resize Images on PDF Pages to Half Size
resize-images-half-size.description: Loads a PDF, extracts each image on every page, scales it to 50% of its original dimensions, and replaces the image in the document before saving.

resize-images-in-pdf.title: Resize Images in PDF Using a Scaling Factor
resize-images-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to read a scaling factor from a configuration file and resize all images embedded in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf APIs.

resize-pdf-images-using-configurable-sca.title: Resize PDF Images Using Configurable Scale Factor
resize-pdf-images-using-configurable-sca.description: Reads an image scaling factor from appsettings.json, loads a PDF, scales each image on every page with Aspose.Pdf, and saves the result, creating a placeholder PDF if the source file is missing.

resize-images-on-pdf-pages.title: Resize Images on PDF Pages Using JSON Configuration
resize-images-on-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a JSON file that defines target widths and heights per page, absorb existing images, remove them, and add them back with new dimensions in a PDF.

add-raster-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Raster Image to PDF Page
add-raster-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert a PNG/JPEG raster image onto a new PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's Image class and the Paragraphs collection.

insert-raster-image-into-pdf.title: Insert Raster Image into PDF at Absolute Coordinates
insert-raster-image-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a raster image onto a specific location of an existing PDF page using absolute coordinates with Aspose.Pdf.

resize-embedded-raster-image.title: Resize Embedded Raster Image in PDF
resize-embedded-raster-image.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate raster Image objects on each page, change their dimensions using FixWidth and FixHeight, and save the modified document.

replace-image-on-pdf-page.title: Replace Image on PDF Page
replace-image-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace an existing image on a specific PDF page with a new image loaded from a file stream using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-raster-image-from-pdf-page.title: Delete Raster Image from PDF Page
delete-raster-image-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific raster image from a PDF page by deleting its reference from the page resources using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-raster-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Raster Images from PDF to PNG
extract-raster-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, locate raster image resources, and save each image as an individual PNG file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-raster-images-from-pdf-preserve-.title: Extract Raster Images from PDF Preserving Original Format
extract-raster-images-from-pdf-preserve-.description: The example loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page's image resources, determines each image's original format by inspecting its header bytes, and writes the images to disk while preserving their native format.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, access each page's image resources with Aspose.Pdf, and save the extracted images to an output directory with proper file extensions.

add-dicom-image-to-pdf-using-filestream.title: Add DICOM Image to PDF Using FileStream
add-dicom-image-to-pdf-using-filestream.description: Shows how to embed a DICOM medical image into a PDF page by reading the image from a FileStream and adding it to the document with Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dicom-image-with-custom-size.title: Insert DICOM Image with Custom Size into PDF
insert-dicom-image-with-custom-size.description: Shows how to add a DICOM image to a PDF document and control its on‑page dimensions by setting custom width and height using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

render-pdf-page-to-png-fallback-font.title: Render PDF Page to PNG with Fallback Font
render-pdf-page-to-png-fallback-font.description: Shows how to render a selected PDF page to a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf while specifying a fallback font through RenderingOptions.

render-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-default-font.title: Render PDF Pages to JPEG with Default Font
render-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-default-font.description: Shows how to convert every page of a PDF document to JPEG images using Aspose.Pdf while specifying a default font for missing glyphs.

generate-pdf-page-thumbnails-png.title: Generate PDF Page Thumbnails as PNG
generate-pdf-page-thumbnails-png.description: Creates a 150x200 pixel PNG thumbnail for each page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's ThumbnailDevice.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-with-default-f.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG with Default Font Override
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-with-default-f.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, setting the default font to Arial for rendering, and converting each page to a high‑resolution JPEG image.

render-pdf-to-tiff-with-lzw-and-font-fal.title: Render PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression and Font Fallback
render-pdf-to-tiff-with-lzw-and-font-fal.description: Loads a PDF, applies a default font fallback for missing characters, and renders the document to a multi‑page TIFF using 300 DPI resolution with LZW compression.

export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-300-dpi.title: Export PDF Pages as BMP Images (300 DPI)
export-pdf-pages-to-bmp-300-dpi.description: Loads a PDF document, sets a 300 DPI resolution, and renders each page to a separate BMP file using Aspose.Pdf's BmpDevice.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-default-f.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF with Default Font
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-default-f.description: Loads a PDF document and converts it into a multi‑page TIFF image using Aspose.Pdf, applying a specific resolution, TIFF settings, and a default font for rendering missing fonts.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, detect vector graphics on a specific page, absorb those graphics, and export them as an SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

move-vector-graphic-position.title: Move Extracted Vector Graphic to New Position in PDF
move-vector-graphic-position.description: Demonstrates how to extract a vector graphic from a PDF page, change its coordinates by updating its Matrix/Position, and re‑insert it back onto the same page using Aspose.Pdf.

transfer-vector-graphic-between-pdf-page.title: Transfer Vector Graphic Between PDF Pages with Position Offset
transfer-vector-graphic-between-pdf-page.description: Shows how to extract vector graphics from a source PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber, modify their position via the transformation matrix, and add them to another page.

remove-vector-graphic-from-pdf-page.title: Remove Vector Graphic from PDF Page
remove-vector-graphic-from-pdf-page.description: Shows how to locate a vector graphic on a PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and delete it from the page's content collection.

transfer-vector-graphic-between-pdf-page.title: Transfer Vector Graphic Between PDF Pages
transfer-vector-graphic-between-pdf-page.description: Shows how to extract vector graphics from a source PDF page using GraphicsAbsorber and insert each graphic onto a target PDF page.

batch-extract-vector-graphics-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs
batch-extract-vector-graphics-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files, detect pages containing vector graphics, and extract each page's vectors as SVG files into dedicated folders.

set-image-alternative-text-pdf.title: Set Alternative Text for Images in PDF
set-image-alternative-text-pdf.description: Shows how to open a PDF, iterate through its pages and image resources, and assign alternative (alt) text to each image to improve accessibility for screen readers.

retrieve-alt-text-from-pdf-images.title: Retrieve Alternative Text from PDF Images
retrieve-alt-text-from-pdf-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and images, extract each image's alternative (alt) text, and log the results for auditing.

add-image-with-alt-text-to-pdf.title: Add Image with Alternative Text to PDF
add-image-with-alt-text-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates inserting an image into a PDF and assigning alternative text for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

render-pdf-pages-to-png-300-dpi.title: Render PDF Pages to PNG at 300 DPI
render-pdf-pages-to-png-300-dpi.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting a 300 DPI resolution, and converting each page to a PNG image.

convert-pdf-to-png-with-default-font.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images with Default Font Substitution
convert-pdf-to-png-with-default-font.description: Loads a PDF document, sets the rendering default font to Times New Roman to handle missing fonts, and converts each page to a PNG image at 300 DPI.

replace-vector-with-raster-image.title: Replace Vector Graphic with Raster Image in PDF
replace-vector-with-raster-image.description: Shows how to overlay a raster image onto a PDF page to visually replace a vector graphic while keeping the original layout intact.
